description: Top passenger-car brands by count of cars with an ACTIVE leasing period today (LeasingGyldigFra <= now AND LeasingGyldigTil >= now). Returns count and share of that brand's currently-registered fleet. Use when user asks which brands lease most, or which brand has the highest leasing penetration today. For fleet-wide leasing penetration and fuel breakdown use dmr-car-leasing-summary.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword IS NOT NULL | EVAL is_leased_now = LeasingGyldigFra IS NOT NULL AND LeasingGyldigTil IS NOT NULL AND LeasingGyldigFra <= NOW() AND LeasingGyldigTil >= NOW() | STATS leased_count = COUNT(*) WHERE is_leased_now, total_count = COUNT(*) BY brand = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword | EVAL leased_share_pct = ROUND(leased_count * 100.0 / total_count, 1) | WHERE total_count >= 500 | SORT leased_count DESC | LIMIT 25
